# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

Do not open a public issue for a suspected security problem.

Instead, contact the maintainer privately with:

- a clear description of the issue
- affected files or areas
- reproduction steps or proof of concept
- impact assessment if known

If no private channel exists, open a minimal public issue asking for a private contact path without disclosing the vulnerability details.

## Response expectations

Security reports will be reviewed as time permits. Initial acknowledgment is best effort rather than guaranteed.

## Scope

This policy covers:

- the macOS app and helper code in this repository
- the scope-discovery CLI and persistence logic
- release artifacts published from this repository
